name: Hosta 'June' Chartreuse Heart - Divided Clump
description: Divided clump of Hosta 'June', chartreuse heart with blue-green margins. Shade-tolerant perennial, ideal for CT gardens.

name: Hosta 'Halcyon' Blue - Divided Clump
description: Hosta 'Halcyon' divided clump, steel-blue foliage, slug-resistant. Thrives in part to full shade.

name: Hosta 'Sum and Substance' - Divided Clump
description: Giant hosta 'Sum and Substance' divided clump, chartreuse-gold leaves up to 18 inches. Great shade specimen.

name: Hosta 'Frances Williams' - Divided Clump
description: Hosta 'Frances Williams' divided clump, blue-green leaves with gold margins. Classic cottage garden hosta.

name: Hosta 'Patriot' White-Edge - Divided Clump
description: Hosta 'Patriot' divided clump, deep green with wide white margins. Brightens shady borders.

name: Echinacea purpurea - Purple Coneflower Seedling
description: Native purple coneflower seedling, pollinator magnet. Long-blooming summer perennial for CT gardens.

name: Echinacea purpurea 'Magnus' - White Coneflower Seedling
description: White coneflower seedling, pure white petals with bronze centers. Excellent cut flower for cottage gardens.

name: Echinacea 'Tiki Torch' - Orange Coneflower Seedling
description: Echinacea 'Tiki Torch' seedling, vivid orange petals. Heat and drought tolerant once established.

name: Ostrich Fern (Matteuccia struthiopteris) - Native
description: Native ostrich fern, vase-shaped fronds to 4 ft. Ideal for moist shady spots in CT gardens.

name: Christmas Fern (Polystichum acrostichoides) - Native
description: Native Christmas fern, evergreen fronds, very adaptable. Excellent for erosion control on slopes.

name: Cinnamon Fern (Osmundastrum cinnamomeum) - Native
description: Native cinnamon fern with distinctive cinnamon-colored fertile fronds. Loves moist woodland gardens.

name: Black-Eyed Susan (Rudbeckia hirta) - Seedling 4-pack
description: Native black-eyed Susan seedling 4-pack. Golden yellow petals, dark centers, blooms July-September in CT.

name: Black-Eyed Susan 'Goldsturm' - Seedling
description: Rudbeckia 'Goldsturm' seedling, award-winning compact cultivar. Dense golden blooms on 24-inch plants.

name: Common Milkweed (Asclepias syriaca) - Seedling
description: Native common milkweed seedling, essential monarch butterfly host plant. Fragrant pink flower clusters.

name: Butterfly Weed (Asclepias tuberosa) - Seedling
description: Native butterfly weed seedling, vivid orange flower clusters. Drought tolerant once established, monarch magnet.

name: Swamp Milkweed (Asclepias incarnata) - Seedling
description: Native swamp milkweed seedling, pink blooms. Tolerates wet conditions, excellent for rain gardens.

name: Echinacea Mixed Colors - Seed Packet
description: Seed packet, mixed echinacea colors (purple, white, orange). Approx 50 seeds, grown at Glastonbury Garden Club.

name: Black-Eyed Susan Wildflower - Seed Packet
description: Seed packet, native black-eyed Susan wildflower mix. Approx 75 seeds, hand-harvested by club members.

name: Milkweed Natives Mix - Seed Packet
description: Seed packet, Connecticut native milkweed mix (common + butterfly weed). Monarch Waystation approved.

name: Hosta 'Guacamole' - Divided Clump
description: Hosta 'Guacamole' divided clump, apple-green center with dark margins. Fragrant white flowers in late summer.
